mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_analysis (application_case_id, company_summary, recent_issues, industry, competitors, interview_points, sources) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{companySummary}, #{recentIssues}, #{industry}, #{competitors}, #{interviewPoints}, #{sources})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM company_analysis WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
